title: besleria gracilenta
intro: Besleria gracilenta, also known as the 'Lance-leaf Besleria' or 'Gracilenta Besleria', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Besleria gracilenta can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and extracts, and is also valued for its antioxidant and expectorant properties.
